symptoms.symptom_name: Chalk-white sharply-demarcated smooth symmetrical macules with leukotrichia

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Complete chalk-white depigmentation with sharp borders, symmetry and leukotrichia is characteristic of vitiligo.
Tinea versicolor is only mildly hypopigmented with fine scale.
Preserved sensation and no nerve thickening argue against leprosy.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Autoimmune screen incl. thyroid function (via GP)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Vitiligo associates with autoimmune thyroid and other conditions.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Wood's lamp / dermatology if diagnosis uncertain
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To confirm depigmentation vs hypopigmentation if unclear.
